category_sources: Official Racket repository describes Racket as a general-purpose programming language and ecosystem.
source_facts.description identifies it as a modern programming language in the Lisp/Scheme family.
display_name_sources: Official repository and documentation use the project name Racket.
source_facts.name is minimal-racket, the minimal distribution formula.
docs_sources: Official Racket repository links to https://docs.racket-lang.org for extensive documentation.
Opened official Racket documentation page titled Racket Documentation.
repo_sources: Official repository states it holds the source code for the core of Racket plus related packages.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official Racket GitHub organization and repository.
tags_sources: Official docs cover Racket language, core libraries, raco, and package management.
